Controller: Orphadine BioTech SE, Norlandia Trade Register NRTR-2026-045128; Corporate Tax/VAT: NR-BTX-204-7719

Processing purposes: MAR Art 18 insider list management, Art 17(4) delay logs, pseudonymised trading plan data for liquidity management, and CSRD/SFDR reporting workpapers; whistleblowing triage under GDPR Art 9(2)(b),(g)
Data categories: employee IDs, board mobile numbers (+33 7 00 00 00 00), work emails, Norlandia Passport Nos. e.g., NRV9938451, biometric access hashes, and IBAN (fictional) XX00 NORB 0000 1234 5678 90 for expense controls

Retention: insider lists 5 years post-disclosure; MAR-relevant communications 7 years; CSRD/SFDR working papers 10 years; deletion recorded in NR-ROPA-REG-8841
